nodes.name: Myiothlypis
nodes.summary: Myiothlypis（Myiothlypis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联15种鸟类，如Grey-headed warbler、Santa Marta warbler、Citrine warbler等15种鸟类。

nodes.name: Riverbank warbler
nodes.summary: The riverbank warbler (Myiothlypis rivularis), sometimes known as the Neotropical river warbler or just river warbler (leading to confusion with Locustella fluviatilis), is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is found at low levels near water in forests and woodlands. Its range includes three disjunct populations, with one (M. r. mesoleuca) in the eastern Amazon of Brazil, the Guianas, and southern and eastern Venezuela, the second (nominate subspecies) in the Atlantic Forest of south-eastern Brazil, eastern Paraguay and far north-eastern Argentina, and the final population (M. r. bolivianus) in the Yungas of Bolivia. References
